---
title: "Footnotes from the Page of Nature, or, First Forms of Vegetation"
---

## Footnotes from the Page of Nature, or, First Forms of Vegetation

**Author:** The Rev. Hugh Macmillan
**Date:** 1861
**Imprint:** Cambridge: Macmillan

### Notes

According to Alexander Macmillan, the author was a relation of his.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
